response.justification: Candidate has 6+ years proven full-stack experience with the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases, Docker, Kubernetes). Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, directly matching a required skill. Strong foundation: MIT CS degree, demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, testing focus, mentorship), and proven ability across multiple languages and domains. Gaps are documentational rather than experiential: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being in primary stack; testing framework specificity (Vitest, Playwright) not documented; cloud/database breadth (PostgreSQL, GCP, Azure) not shown, but overall experience level exceeds core requirements.
strengths: Current role directly addresses AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—a key differentiator requirement
Exceeds 6+ year requirement with demonstrated full-stack expertise: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes across multiple roles
Clear software craftsmanship orientation: TDD commitment, mentorship activities (workshops, refactoring dojos), ability to work across diverse technology landscapes
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being primary stack—framework-specific experience needs verification
Testing framework specificity (Vitest, Playwright) not documented; while TDD philosophy is evident, these particular tools need clarification
Cloud platform breadth limited to AWS; PostgreSQL, GCP, and Azure not mentioned despite general SQL knowledge

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow expertise
Full-stack capability with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and DevOps tools
Nest.js and specific testing framework documentation gaps
